summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DawaLink pharmaceutical marketplace. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend authentication flows work for suppliers and pharmacies, but admin login has navigation issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin button in footer doesn't navigate to admin login form
ui_bugs.description: Clicking the admin button doesn't show the admin login form as expected

passed_tests: Login modal appears when clicking 'Se connecter'
Supplier login flow and dashboard access
Pharmacy login flow and dashboard access
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin login navigation issue - the admin button in footer should navigate to admin login form but currently stays on landing page
